title: May 21
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|May}}

'''May 21''' is the 141st day of the year (142nd in leap years). There are 224 days remaining.</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[File:TESB_poster.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']] released on 21 May, 1980.]]
</noinclude>
*[[1980]] – [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|'''''Star Wars''''': '''Episode V''' '''''The Empire Strikes Back''''']] released.
*1980 – [[Star Wars Weekly 117|''Star Wars Weekly'' 117]] published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter: Prima's Official Game Guide]]'' published.
*2002 – [[Des Webb]] dies.
*[[2003]] – [[Empire 8|''Empire'' 8]] published.
*2003 – [[Kamikaze Douga]] founded.
*[[2008]] – [[Legacy (2006) 24|''Legacy'' (2006) 24]] published.
*2008 – [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Cine-Manga|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' Cine-Manga]] published.
*[[2010]] – 30th anniversary of [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']].
*[[2014]] – [[Darth Maul — Son of Dathomir 1|''Darth Maul — Son of Dathomir'' 1]] published.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Vader Immortal – Episode I]]'' released.
*[[2020]] – "[[Battle of Hoth (episode)|Battle of Hoth]]" premieres on YouTube, commemmorating the 40th anniversary of [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']].
*[[2021]] – "[[Cornered]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*[[2022]] – [[Colin Cantwell]] dies.
*[[2023]] – [[Ray Stevenson]] dies.
*[[2025]] – [[Legacy of Vader 4|''Legacy of Vader'' 4]] published.
*2025 – [[The High Republic – Fear of the Jedi 4|''The High Republic – Fear of the Jedi'' 4]] published.
*2025 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2023) 18|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2023) 18]] published.
<noinclude>
